# Agent Knowledge Cycle (AKC)

> A knowledge cycle for AI agents — one that grows with the people who
> shape it. AKC is a six-phase self-improvement loop (Research → Extract
> → Curate → Promote → Measure → Maintain) that keeps skills, rules,
> and documentation aligned with reality. It is not a one-directional
> optimization loop: as the human curates and promotes knowledge, their
> judgment about what makes good agent behavior also sharpens.
>
> AKC treats human cognitive resources — attention and judgment — as
> the central constraint that does not scale with the model. Research
> is signal-first, recurring decisions are promoted to rules, and
> dialogue is front-loaded because misaligned implementation costs
> more than the conversation that would have prevented it. See ADR-0010.
>
> AKC is not a harness. It runs on top of harnesses (like Everything
> Claude Code) to keep the harness alive as understanding evolves.
> The cycle is the sole defining characteristic — see ADR-0009 for the
> repositioning rationale and ADR-0011 for the genre-neutrality position
> that the cycle operates on any knowledge body (behavioral patterns,
> domain expertise, or constitutional values) without taking a position
> on the content itself.
>
> AKC ships as specifications, JSON schemas, architecture decision
> records, and a dependency-free Python reference implementation.

## Core documentation

- [AI Reference](llms-full.txt): self-contained Q&A + definitions + prior research, optimized for AI search engines
- [README](README.md): project overview, repo tree, design principles
- [AKC Cycle Rules](docs/akc-cycle.md): the cycle as a single rules file, copy-installable to any agent's rules directory
- [Scaffold Dissolution](docs/scaffold-dissolution.md): how skills become unnecessary once the cycle is internalized
- [Inspiration](docs/inspiration.md): prior art and acknowledgements
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): release history

## Architecture Decision Records

- [ADR-0002 Immutable Episode Log](docs/adr/0002-immutable-episode-log.md): append-only JSONL, daily partitioning, owner-only permissions
- [ADR-0003 Three-Layer Distillation](docs/adr/0003-three-layer-distillation.md): Raw episodes → Knowledge → Identity/Rules
- [ADR-0004 Two-Stage Distill Pipeline](docs/adr/0004-two-stage-distill-pipeline.md): free-form reasoning followed by structured formatting
- [ADR-0005 Human Approval Gate](docs/adr/0005-human-approval-gate.md): no auto-promotion to rules, skills, or identity
- [ADR-0008 Code and LLM Collaboration](docs/adr/0008-code-and-llm-collaboration.md): code owns control flow and durable state, LLMs own meaning; four layering patterns
- [ADR-0009 AKC is a Cycle, Not a Harness](docs/adr/0009-akc-is-a-cycle-not-a-harness.md): repositioning AKC as a knowledge cycle rather than a self-improving harness. See the 2026-04-19 addendum for the v2.0.0 extraction of the security triplet (ADR-0001, ADR-0006, ADR-0007)
- [ADR-0010 Human Cognitive Resource as Central Constraint](docs/adr/0010-human-cognitive-resource-as-central-constraint.md): names the implicit philosophy driving every phase — human attention and judgment as the scarce resource; redefines Research as signal-first; adds cognitive economy as a design principle
- [ADR-0011 Cycle Applies to Any Knowledge Body](docs/adr/0011-cycle-applies-to-any-knowledge-body.md): declares the cycle genre-neutral about what flows through it — behavioral patterns, domain expertise, or constitutional values all run through the same mechanism

ADR numbers are permanent identifiers; gaps (0001, 0006, 0007) reflect ADRs extracted in v2.0.0 as genre-specific content.

## Design-pattern skills

Long-form "how" guides paired 1:1 with ADRs. Complement the ADRs with
concrete patterns, code sketches, and audit checklists.

- [when-code-when-llm](docs/skills/when-code-when-llm.md): per-task decision — is this property structural or semantic?
- [code-and-llm-collaboration](docs/skills/code-and-llm-collaboration.md): per-pipeline decision — four layering patterns (guard, filter, judge, orchestrator)
- [signal-first-research](docs/skills/signal-first-research.md): design a research intake filter that admits only information likely to change the next action; paired with ADR-0010

## Specifications

- [Episode log schema](schemas/episode-log.schema.json): Layer 1 record shape
- [Knowledge store schema](schemas/knowledge.schema.json): Layer 2 pattern shape

## Reference implementation and examples

- [examples/minimal_harness/](examples/minimal_harness/): ~300-line dependency-free Python reference demonstrating the three memory layers and the two-stage distill pipeline (cycle on behavioral patterns)
- [examples/minimal_harness/demo.py](examples/minimal_harness/demo.py): deterministic end-to-end demo, runnable with `python3 -m examples.minimal_harness.demo`
- [examples/constitution_amend/](examples/constitution_amend/): reference to contemplative-agent's Constitution-amend workflow — a concrete instance of the AKC cycle applied to constitutional values rather than behavioral patterns. Descriptive only; the implementation lives upstream

## Optional: the six skills

AKC was originally a set of six composable skills, one per phase. They
remain available as external repositories but are not required — the
rules file above installs the entire cycle.

- [search-first](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-search-first) (Research)
- [learn-eval](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-learn-eval) (Extract)
- [skill-stocktake](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-stocktake) (Curate)
- [rules-distill](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-rules-distill) (Promote)
- [skill-comply](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-comply) (Measure)
- [context-sync](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-context-sync) (Maintain)
